runPostTaskHooks.signature: runPostTaskHooks(cwd: string, returnData: RapidReturn): { passed: boolean, issues: HookIssue[], remediation?: string }
runPostTaskHooks.description: Execute all registered post-task hooks and return aggregated results

hooksConfig.signature: hooks/hooks.json ({ hooks: [{ id, type, script, enabled }] })
hooksConfig.description: Hook configuration file declaring registered hooks and their scripts

stateVerificationHook.signature: verifyStateUpdated(cwd: string, returnData: RapidReturn): { stateConsistent: boolean, missingTransitions: string[] }
stateVerificationHook.description: Check if STATE.json reflects the work reported in RAPID:RETURN marker

hookCliCommands.signature: rapid-tools hooks run [--dry-run] | hooks list | hooks enable <id> | hooks disable <id>

readOnlyStateAccess.description: Hook verification reads STATE.json without acquiring a write lock to avoid deadlock with in-progress state transitions

nonBlocking.description: Hook failures produce warnings and remediation prompts but never block the agent pipeline

idempotent.description: Running hooks multiple times on the same RAPID:RETURN produces identical results
